title: The Noah Survives
description: On pages 13–16, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Fish-Man Island Citizens. The central beat is the noah survives.
scene: The scene focuses on the noah survives, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Fish-Man Island Citizens shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That's quite enough!! Have you no shame?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This guy knows what he's talking about.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: How'M I meant to fight like this...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Oh, give it a rest, would you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Well, then shall we finish this...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: AAaaAGHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHH!! What the heck is that monster?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Kyahhhh!! Where did that thing come from?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: TH... that little guy... He suddenly just...!!

summary: The Noah Survives. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
